org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableSet.NILSet<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableSet<T>
      • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableSet.NILSet<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Iterable<T>, ImmutableSet<T>
    Enclosing class:
    DefaultImmutableSet<T>

    private static class DefaultImmutableSet.NILSet<T>
extends DefaultImmutableSet<T>
    represents the empty set for elements of type

    • Method Detail

      • readResolve

        private Object readResolve()
                    throws ObjectStreamException
        the NIL list is a singleton. Deserialization builds a new NIL object that has to be replaced by the singleton.
        Throws:
        ObjectStreamException
